title: [Request] App Search Feature
author: astroboii47
body: Amazing work, it feels so fluid and well made! Would love for an option to search within apps like how [Pixel Search](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=rk.android.app.pixelsearch&hl=en_AU) implements it: you can tap on the app and it searches what you typed within the app (I.e. searches the play store or sends it to Google maps)

title: Request - access contact on press
author: Checkmateuk
body:
Hi there, I'm enjoying the app, but one element is slightly frustrating. When I activate the option to search Contacts, tapping on a result brings up the phone app for that contact.

Could we have the option to open the Contacts app instead? So we can view the full contact details (ie. Address, birthday, email address etc.). Then we could tap to call, message or email from there.

title: Translated app names are not being filtered
author: bjarjfff
body:
There is not enough synchronization between languages. English and a second language. For example, Russian.
So that the application is released not only when you write to Aliexpress, but also Алиэкспресс.

title: [BUG] Don't ping Google when Search suggestions are off
author: NikunjK8
body:
Hello! Overall the app is great and work as expected but i've noticed it makes connection to Google even when search suggestions plugin is not enabled. This isn't good from a privacy standpoint. Specially when you're using a different search engine anyway. I hope you look into it, Thanks.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c86ace3c-8a6f-4bf0-ba87-214eca874a6a)

title: Feature Request : Add Android Shortcut Support
author: sh0nuff
body:
Most apps allow gestures to be applied to not just apps, but also [shortcuts](https://developer.android.com/develop/ui/views/launch/shortcuts).

Adding a shortcut to open a new search would allow gestures in launchers to open a new search without interfering with switching assistants, like how Sesame works now.

body:
The shortcut feature of the app is not working. If I try again, the app is crashing (the system is suggesting to clear the cache).
Device - s22+

title: [BUG] Lawnchair gesture doesn't activate launchpad
author: ssalggnikool
body: If I configure [Lawnchair](https://lawnchair.app/) to open the digital assistant when swiping down, nothing happens when launchpad is chosen as the assistant I'm not really sure if this is an issue with Lawnchair but I am more inclined to think it's launchpad as every other assistant works https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/aa73e012-8dff-4426-ac4b-c7fcd90834d3 [Backup video link](https://files.catbox.moe/oqqy7k.mp4)

title: [Feature Request] Adding Material 3 Expressive UI
author: abholmes
body:
The suggestion is to add **Material 3 Expressive** Design to the Launchpad app. This design system enhances user experience by making interfaces more dynamic and personalized, which is important in today’s design landscape.

Implementing Material 3 can improve the overall user experience, allowing for greater customization options that let users tailor the app to their preferences. It also helps maintain a consistent look and feel across different platforms and devices.

Key features to consider include dynamic color that adapts to user preferences, more fluid animations and adaptable shapes for a more engaging interface, and updated typography styles for better readability and aesthetics.

It is essential to ensure that these new design elements are compatible with existing features and won’t disrupt current user workflows. Conducting user testing to gather feedback on the new design elements before full rollout would also be beneficial.

Thoughts on this proposal are welcome!

title: Search suggestion/Improvements
author: wikd
body: I’m really enjoying this app so far, and I think it has a lot of potential. I do have a few suggestions that could make it even better. The app search feels a bit slow and limited, It would be fantastic if it could also display app shortcuts, similar to the 'My Apps' section in the Play Store. I also enabled the files plugin, but it doesn’t seem to be working at the moment. With a few improvements like these, I can see this becoming a truly excellent replacement for Sesame Shortcuts.

title: [Feature Request]: Aliases / Tags
author: ruckel
body: Being able to map apps to custom phrases would be really handy. Just a simple list of aliases would go a long way!

title: The window shakes/lags when closing
author: potaatu
body: On the latest version, it seems like the window shows a flicker/lag/shaking effect everytime, and it looks really weird. I'm on android 15, OneUI 7. Please fix this!

title: Dim background
author: deepu2
body:
Hey, is it possible to have a "dim background" option and opacity of the dim as a percentage slider? 

I know about the "blur behind", it is spotty (blurs and unblurs when you type something, maybe needs a different issue?) and I'd rather have a dim background than a blur.

body:
1. Add Padding After this 
https://github.com/jaxparrow07/launchpad-search/blob/ff10008c15f021a0d1b8f40c119bcc3fe5abc103/app/src/main/res/layout/search_layout.xml#L83

title: [SUGGESTION] Alternate/ More accessible launch shortcut
author: frieza213
body:
Hey already loving the app, one thing I thought was odd is i have to replace the assistant and while I don't use assistants as much it is a bummer to do that and I thought quick tile and homescreen shortcut are the only other options until i remembered about keymapper it can map keys to do an action or a series of action(super customisable) so I thought why not use it and man it works great to launch the app. I think you should add it as an alternative option for the niche that might want to keep the assistant and fair button accessibility 

TL;DR
 There is an open source app called Keymapper with which you can use perform an action when certain keys are pressed(user defined) so launching the app will be just as quick without replacing assistant 


Even this became long haha hope you read though
Thank You.

title: [Feature Request] 3rd Party Plugins
author: bennett-sh
body: I think it would be super cool if the app could have some kind of integration where the user can install other apps which provide their own plugins. Obviously this is quite a lot of work but it would be really worth it.

title: [Feature request] Support for multiple and custom search engines including installed apps
author: ArjunSindhya
body:
The [Searchbar EX](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.devhomc.search&hl=en-US) app has these features

It hasn't been updated since 2021 though. Some of the features of this app might be a great addition to Launchpad.
